stemHtml: In a continuous loop fire detection system with two loops installed, marked Loop A and Loop B, what will be the indication in the cockpit if Loop A has been crushed, but Loop B is normal?

options.a: An ENG OVERHEAT indication in that engine compartment.
options.b: A fault alert and red master warning light.
options.c: A fault alert and fire warning bell.
options.d: The operation of the system won’t be affected and no indication will appear.
